com.rscja.deviceapi

Class RFIDWithISO14443A

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rscja.deviceapi.RFIDWithISO14443A
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IRFIDWithHFBase, IRFIDWithISO14443A

    public class RFIDWithISO14443A
extends java.lang.Object
implements IRFIDWithISO14443A
    高频14443A协议操作API

    注意事项:
    1. App工程需要导入jna-5.4.0.jar 和 jna-platform-5.4.0.jar
    The App project needs to import jna-5.4.0.jar and jna-platform-5.4.0.jar
    windows系统注意事项:
    2. 需要依赖,UHFAPI.dll ，将这两个文件保存到程序根目录。也可以通过调用setDllOrSOFilePath函数来设置要加载的dll路径。
    2. Need to depend on, UHFAPI.dll , save these two files to the program root directory. You can also set the dll path to load by calling the setDllOrSOFilePath function.
    Linux系统注意事项:
    2.需要依赖 libTagReader.so ，将这个文件保存到命令行根目录。也可以通过调用setDllOrSOFilePath函数来设置要加载的so路径
    2. Need to depend on, libTagReader.so, save these two files to the program root directory. You can also set the so path to load by calling the setDllOrSOFilePath function.


    Example Usage:

    public void HF14443Test(){
      RFIDWithISO14443A rfid14443 = RFIDWithISO14443A.getInstance();
      rfid14443.connect();
     
      HF14443RequestEntity entity = rfid14443.requestTypeA();
      if(entity==null){
       //"Card not found!"
       return;
      }
      byte cMode = 0x60:A ; 0x61:B
      byte cBlock ;
      byte[] txtKey;//6bytes
      boolean reuslt=rfid14443.authentication(cMode,cBlock,txtKey);
      if(!reuslt){
       //The key validation fail
       return;
      }
      //*********************read or write***************************************
      byte[] data=rfid14443.readBlock((byte)cBlock);
      if(data==null){
       //Read failure
       return;
      }
      boolean result=rfid14443.writeBlock(cBlock,writedata);
      if(result){
       //Write failure
      }
      //************************************************************
     
      rfid14443.disconnect();
     }

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static RFIDWithISO14443A getInstance()
        获取UHF操作实例
        Acquire UHF operation Instance
        Returns:
        RFIDWithISO14443A

      • connect

        public boolean connect()
        连接读写器(Connect to the reader)
        Specified by:
        connect in interface IRFIDWithHFBase
        Returns:
        true:success false:fail

      • requestTypeA

        public HF14443RequestEntity requestTypeA()
        寻卡(Search card)
        Returns:
        success will return HF14443RequestEntity data, failure will return null.

      • requestTypeA

        public HF14443RequestEntity requestTypeA(int mode)
        寻卡(Search card)
        Specified by:
        requestTypeA in interface IRFIDWithISO14443A
        Parameters:
        mode - 0x26:request idle; 0x52:request all
        Returns:
        success will return HF14443RequestEntity data, failure will return null.

      • authentication

        public boolean authentication(byte cMode,
                              byte cBlock,
                              byte[] pcKey)
        验证14443A卡(Authentication 14443A card)
        Specified by:
        authentication in interface IRFIDWithISO14443A
        Parameters:
        cMode - 模式0x60:类型A,0x61类型B (0x60 A type key, 0x61 B type key)
        cBlock - 要写入的数据块S50 0-63,S70 0-255(the cBlock of card,such as S50 card value 0~63,S70 0~255)
        pcKey - 6个字节的密码(6 bytes key value)
        Returns:
        true:success false:fail

      • readBlock

        public byte[] readBlock(byte cBlock)
        读卡(Read card)
        Specified by:
        readBlock in interface IRFIDWithISO14443A
        Parameters:
        cBlock - 数据块0~63 (the cBlock of card,such as M1 card value 0~63 )
        Returns:
        success will return data, failure will return null.

      • writeBlock

        public boolean writeBlock(byte cBlock,
                          byte[] pcBlockData)
        写卡(Write card)
        Specified by:
        writeBlock in interface IRFIDWithISO14443A
        Parameters:
        cBlock - 要写入的数据块S50 0-63,S70 0-255(the cBlock of card,such as S50 card value 0~63,S70 0~255)
        pcBlockData - 十六个字节的数据(16 bytes Block data)
        Returns:
        true:success false:fail

      • ratsTypeA

        public byte[] ratsTypeA()
        CPU卡RATS操作指令(CPU card RATS operation command)
        Specified by:
        ratsTypeA in interface IRFIDWithISO14443A
        Returns:
        success will return data, failure will return null.

      • cpuCommand

        public byte[] cpuCommand(byte[] cmd)
        CPU卡发送命令(execute cpu card command)
        Specified by:
        cpuCommand in interface IRFIDWithISO14443A
        Parameters:
        cmd - 命令数据
        Returns:
        success will return data, failure will return null.

      • disconnect

        public void disconnect()
        断开连接(disconnect)
        Specified by:
        disconnect in interface IRFIDWithHFBase

      • setDllOrSOFilePath

        public void setDllOrSOFilePath(java.lang.String directory,
                               java.lang.String fileName)
        设置加载的dll文件路径
        Parameters:
        directory - dll文件目录,如果文件目录为null，将采用可运行的jar文件执行路径
        fileName - dll文件名称，如果文件名为null，将使用默认文件名UHFAPI.dll 备注:如果需要使用此函数，请在调用init函数之前调用此函数。
